identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.philosophy: Tactile Clarity. Accessibility is not a constraint; it is an aesthetic. We reject 'subtle' gray-on-gray. We embrace bold contrast, massive typography, and touch-friendly interfaces.
core_principles: Contrast is King: Minimum 4.5:1 always. Prefer 7:1.
No Hover-Only Info: All information must be visible without interaction.
Map as Canvas: Markers are 'stickers', not pins. They are big, clear, and distinct.

rules: Line height must be at least 1.5 for body text.
Paragraph spacing must be 2x the line height.

secondary.description: Vibrant Yellow. Use for high-visibility actions (CTAs).

background.description: Off-white to reduce glare, but high contrast.

usage_rules: Text is ALWAYS #001F3F (Navy) or #111111 (Black) on light backgrounds.
Never use gray text for essential information.
Borders on inputs and cards must be at least 2px thick for visibility.

layout.grid_strategy: Simple Linear Flow. Avoid complex masonry. Use 1-column on mobile, max 3-columns on desktop to reduce cognitive load.

containers.card: bg-surface border-2 border-border rounded-lg p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,31,63,1)] hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,31,63,1)] transition-all
containers.panel: bg-surface border-r-2 border-border h-full p-6 overflow-y-auto

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-bold text-lg shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-secondary
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-bold text-lg border-2 border-primary shadow-none transition-transform active:scale-95 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-bold text-lg

inputs.default: h-12 border-2 border-border rounded-md px-4 text-lg focus:border-primary focus:ring-4 focus:ring-secondary/50 outline-none bg-white text-primary placeholder:text-gray-500
inputs.label: block text-lg font-bold mb-2 text-primary

map_markers.style: w-10 h-10 bg-primary text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-white shadow-xl font-bold text-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer
map_markers.cluster: w-12 h-12 bg-secondary text-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-primary font-black text-xl

checklist: All images must have alt text.
Focus rings must be thick (4px) and high contrast (Yellow/Blue).
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, footer).
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (though icon-only buttons are discouraged).

hero_landing.alt: Diverse group of friends celebrating on a rooftop, representing community events.

vendor_showcase.alt: Simple outdoor wedding setup with white chairs, representing venue services.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Public Sans' from Google Fonts to index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and border radius defined above.
3. BUILD LAYOUTS: Use the 'Card' style defined in 'layout.containers' for all vendor listings.
4. MAP INTEGRATION: Ensure map markers follow the 'map_markers' style. Do not use default Google Maps pins.
5. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
